emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Wyatt Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 58/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

MEDIUM
--------------------
- No viewport meta tag
 HIGH
--------------------
- 8 HTTP resources
 HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL certificate warning
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 25+ external scripts
 HIGH
--------------------
- Not mobile responsive


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: Without viewport meta, mobile browsers display the desktop site zoomed out.
issues.label: No viewport meta tag
issues.check: Open on a phone. Is the text tiny and you need to pinch to read?
issues.siteHint: Google uses mobile-first indexing - mobile issues directly affect rankings.

issues.detail: Multiple resources loading over HTTP on an HTTPS page triggers browser warnings.
issues.label: 8 HTTP resources
issues.check: Check the address bar lock icon. Mixed content warnings hurt trust.
issues.siteHint: Browser warnings on your site erode trust instantly.

issues.label: No SSL certificate warning
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Over 25 script tags means 5-8 seconds of load time on standard connections.
issues.label: 25+ external scripts
issues.check: Open DevTools > Performance tab and record a page load.
issues.siteHint: Every second of load time reduces conversions by 7%.

issues.detail: The site doesn't adapt to different screen sizes. Buttons and text overlap on mobile.
issues.label: Not mobile responsive
issues.check: Resize your browser to mobile width. Does content break or overflow?
issues.siteHint: 93% of couples research venues on their phone before booking.
